summary: Frontend testing of new features: API key settings dialog, inline task editing, countdown badge. All 11 test items passed.

issues: API key button stays non-red even when localStorage key removed, because REACT_APP_GEMINI_API_KEY env var is always present as fallback. Button correctly shows red only if BOTH localStorage and env var are absent. This is expected behavior given current code.

critical_code_review_comments: gemini.js mapError function only catches errors in catch block but throws new Error(mapError(err)) which could lose original stack trace - low priority
App.js line 24: apiKey falls back to process.env.REACT_APP_GEMINI_API_KEY - means the 'red button' indicator won't show in production if env var is set, which is correct but worth documenting
seed_data_creation: Injected 2 test tasks: test1 (pending, Mar 1 2026 deadline -> Overdue), test2 (completed, TBD deadline -> no badge)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: API key dialog (open/save/toast/show-hide), countdown badge (Overdue for past dates, no badge for TBD), inline editing (click title, Save/Cancel buttons, Enter key, Escape key, pencil icon on hover, completed tasks not editable). REACT_APP_GEMINI_API_KEY is set in .env.

test_results.2_api_key_dialog_elements: PASS - input, show/hide toggle, warning, save button all present
test_results.3_save_api_key_closes_dialog_toast: PASS - dialog closes, toast shows 'API key updated'
test_results.5_tbd_no_badge: PASS - TBD task shows no countdown badge
test_results.7_save_with_button: PASS - title updates with Save button
test_results.9_pencil_icon_hover: PASS - pencil icon visible on pending task hover
test_results.10_completed_not_editable: PASS - no pencil, no click-to-edit on completed task
test_results.11_api_key_btn_red_no_key: NOTE - button shows red only if both localStorage and env var are absent; with REACT_APP_GEMINI_API_KEY set in .env, button stays normal
